titleStmt.title: SII 22.240: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 240. (A.R. No. 240 of 1906) NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT, CHEYYAR TALUK, TIRUPPANAṄGĀḌU. ŚIVA TEMPLE—ON THE WEST WALL OF THE KṚIPĀNĀTHA SHRINE. KṚISHṆADĒVA-MAHĀRĀYA—Śaka 1432.

summary.p: The details of date are given as Pramōdūta, Karkaṭaka, śu. 3, Monday, Punarvasu corresponding to A.D. 1510, July 8. The nakshatra was Maghā not Punarvasu. The king is called the son of Narasānāyaka who bears the birudas Gaṇḍa kaṭāri Sāḷuva and Vanyavēṭṭai-kaṇḍaruḷiya. The inscription records the gift of the taxes on yarn due to him from the weavers of the village by Tirumalaināyakar, son of Ellappa-nāyakar, for meeting the expenses of special worship and offerings known as Vasanta-maṇḍapa-ubayam on the 6th day of the festival in the month of Vaigāśi in the temple of Tiruppaṉaṅgāḍuḍaiyār.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrīman mahāmaṇḍaleśvara metini misarakaṇṭa kaṭāri sāḷuva pūrvadakṣiṇa paccima Uttarasamutrātipati vannyaveṭṭai kaṇṭaruḷiya narasānāyakka Uṭaiyar kumāra kṛṣṇadevamahārāyar prituvirājyam paṇṇāniṉṟa
sakābdam 1000 4 100 3 10 2- ṉ melcellā niṉṟa pramotūta samvatsarattu kaṟkaṭaka nāyaṟṟu pūrvapakṣattu tṛtikaiyum somavāramum peṟṟa puṇarpūcattu nāḷ jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattuk kāliyūrk koṭṭattuk kaḻumala
vaḷanāṭṭup piramatecappaṟṟu tiruppaṉaiṅkāṭu Uṭaiyār tiruppaṉaṅkā vuṭaiya nayiṉāṟkuttiruvaikācittirunāḷ Āṟān=tirunāḷ vasantamaṇḍapa Upaiyam Ellappanāyakkar kumārar tirumalaināyakkar tammiṭaiya Upaiya
māka kaṭṭaḷai paṇṇukaiyil Inta Upayattukku Uṭaiyār tirup paṉaiṅkāvuṭaiya nayiṉār tirumaṇṭapattil tirumuṉ Amutukku tirumuṉkāṇi yum tiruviti pantattukkum vitimaṇṭapattu veṇṭum pala veñcaṉattukkum Āka
tiruppaṉaiṅkāṭu kaikkoḷar pala paṭṭaṭaiyil Uṇṭāṉa paṭṭaṭai ṉūlāyam Uṇṭāṉatum Iṉṉayiṉāṟku taṉmatāṉam citārikku Āka tevatāṉam vaṉpākkam viyāpārikaḷ nayiṉāṉ ceṭṭi vayiravaṉ
Uḷḷiṭṭār peril Uṇṭāṉa paṭṭaṭai nūlāyamum Inta Upayam Iraṇ ṭukkum tirumalaināyakkar tarmamāka cantiṟātittavaraikkum celluvatākavum Inta tarmattukku Akitam paṇṇiṉavarkaḷ keṅkaikkaraiyil kārām pacuvaik koṉṟa toṣattile poka
kaṭavarkaḷākavum .
Digital edition of SII 22.240 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
